{{Quote|There is a problem. Our contacts on Coruscant are dead.|Bando Gora Captain|<ref name="Bounty Hunter" />}}
This '''Bando Gora Captain'''<ref name="Bounty Hunter" /> was a prominent figure among the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]]. The [[Unidentified earless humanoid species|alien]] cultist was [[Komari Vosa]]'s chief [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] and relayed information about the outside world to her. Unlike lesser cultists, the captain was still capable of speaking.

==Behind the scenes==
The game manual and credits list the character as "Bando Gora Captain" voiced by [[Nick Jameson]]. This character is labeled in an out-of-universe capacity as "Mysterious Scene Stealer" in the outtakes of the ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' video game, having barged in on the recruitment of [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] by [[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]]. The character's actual name is never given, and their fate is unknown.
